description: Rustynet MCP server manifest — three servers providing repo context, gate running, and lab state management for AI agents.

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-repo-context
servers.description: Structured access to the Rustynet documentation graph, requirements, security controls, architecture constraints, and codebase structure. 13 tools.

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-gate-runner
servers.description: Runs Rustynet quality gates on demand — cargo fmt, check, clippy, test, audit, deny, and phase-specific CI scripts. 9 tools.

servers.name: rustynet-mcp-lab-state
servers.description: Queries and manages the UTM VM lab — discovery, restart, recovery, repo sync, bootstrap, diagnostics, and run matrix evidence. 11 tools.
